meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve no version control (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no version control. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Pricing & Version Control for Freelancers: A Guide
content.seo_description: Master SaaS pricing and fix version control issues. Learn to use Antigravity and Claude Code to ship professional, scalable apps faster as a freelancer.
content.answer_block: To eliminate the chaos of unversioned code while scaling your SaaS, implement a Git-based workflow integrated with Claude Code. By automating your deployment pipeline and tying pricing tiers to feature-flagged environments, you ensure every version is traceable, testable, and directly tied to your revenue growth strategy.
content.intro:
You are staring at a folder of 'final_v2_real_final' files, terrified that a single push will dismantle your client’s entire production environment. The lack of version control isn't just a technical debt; it is a ticking time bomb waiting to explode your reputation and your revenue.

But the professional way out is closer than you think. By marrying rigorous version control with a strategic SaaS pricing model, you transform your development process from a chaotic scramble into a predictable, high-margin engine. This guide bridges the gap between amateur coding and enterprise-grade delivery.

steps.title: Initialize Version-Controlled Scaffolding
steps.description: Establish a clean repository structure to ensure every change is tracked from line one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a robust project structure with Git version control, a .gitignore file tailored for SaaS development, and a README.md that outlines the project architecture.

steps.title: Define SaaS Pricing Architecture
steps.description: Map your pricing tiers to specific technical modules to ensure modular feature delivery.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service-oriented architecture for a SaaS pricing engine. Define three tiers: Basic, Pro, and Enterprise, with clear configuration mappings for feature gating.

steps.title: Implement Feature Gating Logic
steps.description: Secure your code by wrapping premium features in conditional logic tied to the pricing model.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a TypeScript middleware to intercept API requests and validate user subscription status against the feature gating logic defined in the pricing module.

steps.title: Automate Deployment Pipelines
steps.description: Use Claude Code to configure CI/CD scripts so that every commit is tested and versioned.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow that runs unit tests and checks for version tag consistency before allowing a production deployment.

steps.title: Version-Controlled Client Handover
steps.description: Finalize the project with a clean, documented commit history that builds client trust.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the repository for any hardcoded secrets and generate a professional migration guide for the client to assume ownership of the versioned codebase.

pro_tips: Use semantic versioning (SemVer) even in private repos to track breaking changes in your pricing logic.
Never hardcode pricing values; pull them from an environment-protected JSON or database schema.
Implement 'Audit Logs' as a core feature; clients pay premium rates for transparency and security.
Use Claude Code to write tests for your pricing logic first to ensure your billing is bulletproof.
Always maintain a 'staging' branch that mirrors production, so you never test pricing changes in the live environment.
resources: Git Best Practices for SaaS: https://git-scm.com/book/en/v2
content.next_steps: Once your first versioned project is live, integrate a subscription management API like Stripe and link your feature gates to their webhook events to fully automate your billing.
content.conversion_block: Stop losing money on manual fixes and start shipping like an agency powerhouse. Your code deserves a professional home, and your time deserves a premium rate. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
